subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Splitter of the grain and Creator of all souls, Thou hast brought into being a luminous essence and a merciful reality [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا فالق الحبه و بارء النسمه قد خلقت کینونه نورانیه و حقیقه رحمانیه و
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @martyrs and martyrdom, @prayer for martyrs, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
